title: onobrychis arenaria f. austriaca
intro: Onobrychis arenaria f. austriaca, also known as Austrian sainfoin, is a type of legume plant that belongs to the pea family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as a natural antispasmodic agent. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in bioactive compounds that may help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and other health issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Austrian sainfoin can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
